title: Acceptance Criteria Schema
description: Comprehensive acceptance criteria format using Given/When/Then (Gherkin) syntax with full detail capture

id.description: Optional identifier for this acceptance criterion
examples: AC-1
AC-2

title.description: Short descriptive title for the acceptance criterion
examples: Project initialization succeeds
Folder picker opens correctly

oneOf.description: Single precondition - capture the FULL text after 'Given'

given.description: Precondition(s) that must be true before the action - include complete text
examples: I am starting a new project
I have opened the BMAD UI application
I am viewing the Kanban board with story cards
user is on login page
user has valid credentials

oneOf.description: Single action - capture the FULL text after 'When'

when.description: Action(s) performed by the user or system - include complete text
examples: I run the initialization command `npm create vite@latest bmad-ui -- --template react-ts`
I click the "Select Folder" button
cards are rendered in each column

oneOf.description: Single expected outcome - capture the FULL text after 'Then'

then.description: Expected outcome(s) after the action - include complete text
examples: the project is created with React 19.2, TypeScript 5.x, and Vite 5.x
a folder picker dialog appears
cards in the "Backlog" column have a neutral gray color scheme

and.description: Additional conditions or outcomes following 'And' statements - capture ALL of them
examples: the project structure includes `/src/components`, `/src/hooks`, `/src/stores`, `/src/utils`, `/src/types` directories
TypeScript is configured with strict mode enabled in `tsconfig.json`
ESLint is configured with airbnb-typescript rules
Prettier is configured for code formatting
the development server starts successfully with `npm run dev`
the project builds successfully with `npm run build`
the password is not stored in plain text

priority.description: Priority level of this acceptance criterion

testIds.description: References to test IDs that verify this criterion
examples: TEST-001
TEST-002

automationStatus.description: Whether this criterion has automated tests

notes.description: Additional notes or context for this criterion
